summary: Iteration 77: Tested right-click context menus across 6 operational modules (Housekeeping, Echo Concierge, Engineering Work Tickets, FOH Operations, Retail Ops, MinibarIRD) and re-tested Guest Ordering Platform. All backend APIs (18 tests) passed. All frontend context menus working correctly with proper menu items.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all context menus and guest ordering working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 modules with context menus tested and working: 1) Housekeeping (under Engineering & Facilities) - room tiles have context menu with Mark Clean/Inspected/Dirty, Out of Order, VIP Prep, Assign options. 2) Echo Concierge (via toolbar button) - ticket rows have context menu with Start Working, Dispatch, Mark Resolved, Close Ticket, Escalate to GM. 3) Engineering Work Tickets (under Engineering & Facilities > Engineering Ops) - ticket rows have context menu with Schedule, Mark Complete, Close Ticket, Set Critical. 4) FOH Operations (under Events & Catering > Front of House) - floor map tables have context menu with Seat Table/Clear Table, Assign options. 5) Retail Operations (under Financial & Purchasing > Retail) - inventory items have context menu with Record Sale, Charge to Room, Adjust Stock. 6) MinibarIRD (under Events & Catering > IRD & Minibar) - order rows have context menu with Mark Preparing, Out for Delivery, Mark Delivered, Cancel Order. Guest Platform tab shows QR code. Guest Ordering at /guest-order works end-to-end (auth -> menu -> cart -> order confirmation).

frontend_context_menu_tests: Housekeeping: Right-click on room tile shows context menu with Mark Clean, Mark Inspected, Mark Dirty, Out of Order, VIP Prep, Assign options
Echo Concierge: Right-click on ticket row shows context menu with Start Working, Dispatch, Mark Resolved, Close Ticket, Escalate to GM
Engineering Work Tickets: Right-click on ticket row shows context menu with Schedule, Mark Complete, Close Ticket, Set Critical
FOH Operations: Right-click on floor map table shows context menu with Seat Table, Assign options for all servers
Retail Operations: Right-click on inventory item shows context menu with Record Sale, Charge to Room, Adjust Stock
MinibarIRD: Right-click on order row shows context menu with Mark Preparing, Out for Delivery, Mark Delivered, Cancel Order
guest_ordering_e2e: Menu loads with All Day Menu (17 items)
Categories: Food & Dining (8), Beverages (3), Sundries (3), Amenities (3)
Cart view shows item with quantity controls and special instructions
Place Order creates order and shows confirmation with Order ID, Total, Est. Delivery
